title: PlayCua full integration: wire pheno-errors + pheno-tracing + pheno-config

commits.subject: feat(playcua): wire pheno-errors + pheno-tracing + pheno-config (L5 #81)
commits.summary: Initial commit: integration crate + PlayCuaApp struct + tests

commits.subject: feat(playcua): align integration crate to pheno_config::Config API (L5 #81)

summary: Created standalone integration crate at PlayCua/crates/integration/ (workspace-excluded).
Added path dependencies to pheno-errors, pheno-tracing, and pheno-config at repos root.
Implemented PlayCuaApp struct with Config-typed field, AppError-based error handling, and tracing initialization.
Added no-op run() placeholder returning Result<(), AppError>.
Created minimal pheno-errors (AppError + AppResult) and pheno-tracing (init/init_json/init_with_file) crates at repos root since source was missing.
Created/used pheno-config (Config struct, ConfigBuilder, load_from_env) at repos root.
All tests pass via cargo test --manifest-path crates/integration/Cargo.toml.

notes: pheno-config at root provides concrete Config struct + ConfigBuilder; integration crate uses both.
pheno-errors and pheno-tracing were missing at root; created minimal functional crates.
Isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR used to avoid cross-worktree Cargo artifact lock contention.

test_log_excerpt: test result: ok. 3 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 0.04s
notes: Initial commit 49a28aa used a custom PlayCuaConfig struct; refined in 606805c to use the concrete pheno_config::Config struct + ConfigBuilder to match the actual pheno-config API.
